content.en:
Ye Tian chatted with the Tianyang Realm Lord for a while.

Suddenly, the Heavenly Yang Realm Lord said, "Ye Heavenly Realm Lord, do you want to participate in the Six Capital Grand Meeting of the Six Capital Boundary Mountain?"

"Liudu Festival, what is this?"

Ye Tian heard of it for the first time.

The Tianyang Realm Lord introduced: "The Six Capital Grand Event is a grand event held by the Six Capital Realm Mountain, and only the extradimensional realm of the second realm cultivation is eligible to participate. There will be some good things from the territory of 5,000 at the Six Capital Event, and we can trade these good things at the Six Capital Event. "

"The Liudu Boundary Mountain will be so kind to take out those things? We can't exchange many good things with it, we can only use ordinary extra-dimensional resources, this is not good for the Liudu Boundary Mountain, right?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

The Tianyang Realm Lord smiled slightly, "The Liudu Boundary Mountain is naturally not so kind, and there are also requirements for wanting to participate in the Liudu "413" event, and you need to complete a task in the Liudu Boundary Mountain in order to obtain the admission token for the Liudu Festival." "

"What task?"

Ye Tian was curious.

The Tianyang Realm Lord said with a slightly solemn expression: "You need to guard the Six Capital Boundary Wall for a hundred extradimensional epochs to obtain an admission token for the Six Capital Grand Event, and such a token can only be used once." The next time I participate, I have to continue to guard the boundary wall of the six capitals. "

Liudu boundary wall?

Ye Tian didn't know what this was, but in the introduction of the Tianyang Realm Lord, he quickly knew what the Six Capital Boundary Wall was.

It turned out that the Liudu Boundary Wall was a sealed place, where a superdimensional race was sealed, and that extradimensional race was very powerful, with multiple third-realm existences, and there were even more second-realm existences.

Once, this extradimensional creature race was the master of the 6000 Territory, but it was defeated by the forces behind the Liudu Boundary Mountain, because this extradimensional creature race has a very terrible hole card, it is very difficult to completely destroy it, and it needs to pay a heavy price.

As a result, the forces behind the Liudu Realm Mountain directly sealed the area where this extra-dimensional creature race was located, and used an astonishing treasure to suppress the strength of those super-dimensional realms of the third realm to the existence of the second realm.

Therefore, none of these extradimensional creatures can break the seal.

However, after a long period of time, there will still be some problems in this sealed place, and many second realm existences need to guard this place for a long time to prevent this extradimensional creature race from rushing out.

If it rushes out, the Liudu Realm Mountain will be destroyed, and the forces behind it will also face losses.

And where will the forces behind it send a large number of second realm towns to guard here, they naturally hope that the native second realm of the 6,000 territory will guard here.

That's how it all came about.

"The forces behind the Liudu Boundary Mountain paid such a big price to deal with that extradimensional race, do they want to gain something?"

Ye Tian asked.

If it is said that it occupies the territory of the Six Thousand Numbers, it is unlikely, because the Six Capital Boundary Mountains are very low-key, and they have not cultivated a large number of extradimensional realms, and they occupy very little territory.

So, it can only be other reasons.

The Tianyang Realm Lord speculated: "It is said that that extradimensional creature race has amazing treasures, and the forces behind the Liudu Realm Mountain want it, but it should not have been obtained so far. And at present, there is no way to completely destroy it, unless the forces behind the Liudu Realm Mountain give birth to the existence of the Fourth Realm, it will be sure to completely solve this extradimensional creature race. Of course, it is best for us to maintain the status quo all the time, so that we can trade a lot of good things with the help of the Liudu Boundary Mountain. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

During the conversation with the Tianyang Realm Lord, he learned that the Six Capital Grand Events would be held after the Six Extradimensional Eras, and at this time, if anyone wanted to participate in the Six Capital Grand Event, they could communicate with the Six Capital Boundary Mountain in advance, and as long as they made a contract and promised to guard the Six Capital Boundary Wall, they could get the admission token for the Six Capital Grand Event.

Soon.

Ye Tian went to find a second realm in the Liudu Boundary Mountain, explained his purpose, and then made a superdimensional oath, and successfully obtained an admission token for the Liudu Festival.

Of course, he doesn't need to go to guard the boundary wall of the six capitals now, he can wait for ten extradimensional epoch time, and then follow the arrangement at any time, once there is a serious lack of second realm guards, he will let him go over and guard a hundred extradimensional epoch time.

For Ye Tian, there was no problem at all with just letting a replica body guard a hundred extradimensional eras.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, six extradimensional epochs had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian took the admission token and went to the place where the Liudu Grand Event was held, that is, a peak in the Liudu Boundary Mountain0 .........

Here, Ye Tian saw a lot of extradimensional realms, all of which were the existence of the second realm, and he also met the Tianyang Realm Lord, and the other party also came to participate.

The Lord of the Tianyang Realm came here, wanting to trade a treasure that could heal his injuries, once the injuries recovered, even if he went to guard the hundred extradimensional epochs of the Six Capital Boundary Walls, it was worth it.

Of course.

This is a normal transaction, and you still have to pay super dimensional dao coins, and it is impossible to give them resources for free.

Soon, the existence of the second realm sat on the throne, waiting for the grand event to open.

When the time is almost up, the second realm that should be come has come.

Then.

Rumble!!!

A transcendent realm cultivated in the late stage of the second realm has arrived. []

"It's the Sea Peak Realm Lord of the Six Capital Boundary Mountains!"

Some of the second realms recognized each other's identities.

Sea Peak Realm Lord!

Ye Tian had some understanding of this second realm, after he broke through to the second realm, he naturally inquired about the information and materials of the second realm of the six thousand number one realm, and the sea peak realm master was definitely in the top twenty on the bright side of the six thousand number one territory, which could be described as very powerful, and the super dimensional rule realm was very high, definitely above the one point realm.

Of course.

Ye Tian's current strength is also very strong, 3.9 is only inferior to the other party, but his combat power is definitely not inferior to the other party, and it may even exceed a little.

"Distinguished guests, welcome to our Liudu Festival in the Liudu Boundary Mountain, there are a lot of treasures prepared this time, enough for you to trade enough treasures. As long as you have enough net worth, even if you buy 10 items and 100 items, there is no problem. "

"Now for the first treasure. "

Wow!

A treasure is presented.

This is a medium-sized extra-dimensional Dao soldier, suitable for the existence of the second realm.

Moreover, the quality of this medium extra-dimensional dao soldier is quite good, and it is definitely the top among the medium extra-dimensional dao soldiers.

There are very few people in the 6,000th Territory who have the ability to refine this kind of super-dimensional Dao soldiers, and some of the new second realms naturally do not have super-dimensional Dao soldiers of this level, so they naturally want to bid.
